title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repository that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, providing a simple interface to interact with local LLMs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, enabling browser and Node.js integration.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing use of local models in LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chat, code highlighting, PDF upload, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with streaming, chat, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama, providing idiomatic Ruby access to local LLMs.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: GitHub Actions workflows to automate Ollama model pulls, benchmarks, and CI integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama with CUDA, ROCm, and CPU variants.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama, enabling local models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Reference RAG implementation using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain with PDF ingestion.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama with app mentions, threads, and model selection.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter template exposing Ollama endpoints with OpenAI-compatible chat completions.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app for Ollama with session memory, model selector, and markdown rendering.
